name: Monthly Target Report Test
query:
SELECT
    C.name as "customer",
    C.customer_name as "customer_name",
   
    (SELECT SUM(SI.total)
     FROM `tabSales Invoice` SI
     INNER JOIN `tabSales Team` st ON st.parent = SI.name
     WHERE SI.customer = C.name
       AND st.sales_person = 'SANTHOSH KUMAR K'
       AND SI.status <> 'Cancelled'
       AND SI.docstatus = 1
       AND (
            (MONTH(SI.posting_date) = MONTH(CURRENT_DATE) - 1 AND YEAR(SI.posting_date) = YEAR(CURRENT_DATE))
            OR (MONTH(CURRENT_DATE) = 1 AND MONTH(SI.posting_date) = 12 AND YEAR(SI.posting_date) = YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - 1)
           )
    ) AS "month_1",
    
    IFNULL(
        (SELECT SUM(SI1.total) 
        FROM `tabSales Invoice` SI1
        INNER JOIN `tabSales Team` st1 ON st1.parent = SI1.name
        WHERE SI1.customer = C.name
        AND st1.sales_person = 'SANTHOSH KUMAR K'
        AND SI1.docstatus = 1
        AND SI1.is_return = 0
        AND (
             (MONTH(SI1.posting_date) = MONTH(CURRENT_DATE) - 2 AND YEAR(SI1.posting_date) = YEAR(CURRENT_DATE))
             OR (MONTH(CURRENT_DATE) = 1 AND MONTH(SI1.posting_date) = 11 AND YEAR(SI1.posting_date) = YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - 1)
            )
        ), 0
    ) AS "month_2",
     IFNULL(
        (SELECT SUM(SI1.total) 
        FROM `tabSales Invoice` SI1
        INNER JOIN `tabSales Team` st1 ON st1.parent = SI1.name
        WHERE SI1.customer = C.name
        AND st1.sales_person = 'SANTHOSH KUMAR K'
        AND SI1.docstatus = 1
        AND SI1.is_return = 0
        AND (
             (MONTH(SI1.posting_date) = MONTH(CURRENT_DATE) - 3 AND YEAR(SI1.posting_date) = YEAR(CURRENT_DATE))
             OR (MONTH(CURRENT_DATE) = 1 AND MONTH(SI1.posting_date) = 10 AND YEAR(SI1.posting_date) = YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - 1)
            )
        ), 0
    ) AS "month_3"
FROM `tabCustomer` C
WHERE C.disabled = 0
  AND C.sales_person = "SANTHOSH KUMAR K";
